content:
💡 deskreen | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Extending a computer's display to other devices wirelessly using a web browser.
✨ Key Features: • Turns any device with a web browser into a secondary screen • Uses WebRTC for live screen streaming • Supports Windows, macOS, and Linux • End-to-end encryption (mentioned in topics) • Share app window (mentioned in topics)
📖 Summary: Deskreen CE is an Electron.js application that allows users to turn any device with a web browser into a secondary screen for their computer. It utilizes WebRTC for live screen sharing and supports Windows, macOS, and Linux.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 arcada | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Creating and visualizing interior floor plans and designs.
✨ Key Features: • Add walls • Edit walls • Add/edit furniture • Add doors/windows • Measure tool
📖 Summary: Arcada is an open-source, web-based interior design and floor plan creation software. It allows users to draw walls, add doors and windows, place furniture, and measure spaces accurately to scale, with support for multiple floors and saving/loading designs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 page-agent | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling users to control web interfaces with natural language, making web applications more accessible and automating complex workflows like form filling and SaaS AI copilot integration.
✨ Key Features: • Easy integration directly in-page JavaScript • No browser extension or headless browser required • Text-based DOM manipulation • Bring your own LLMs
📖 Summary: Page Agent is a JavaScript library that allows users to control web interfaces using natural language. It integrates directly into the webpage, eliminating the need for browser extensions or external tools, and enables text-based DOM manipulation powered by user-provided LLMs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 webnovel-writer | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: AI-assisted long-form web novel writing, ensuring consistency and coherence over extended narratives.
✨ Key Features: • Manages character settings, plot points, and world-building rules • Solves AI 'forgetting' and 'hallucination' issues in long-form writing • Supports serialization of up to 2 million characters • Integrates with Claude Code via a plugin
📖 Summary: Webnovel Writer is a Python-based system designed to assist in writing long-form web novels using Claude Code. It addresses common AI writing issues like memory loss and hallucinations by managing plot points, character settings, and world-building rules, enabling continuous serialization of up to 2 million characters without contradictions.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 CyberStrikeAI | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating and orchestrating comprehensive security testing and vulnerability management through an AI-driven platform.
✨ Key Features: • AI-native security testing platform • Integration of 100+ security tools • Intelligent orchestration engine • Role-based testing with predefined security roles • Skills system with specialized testing skills
📖 Summary: CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go, designed to automate and enhance cybersecurity testing. It integrates over 100 security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, and AI agents to manage the entire security testing lifecycle, from vulnerability discovery to reporting.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
